nasb.text: He made known to us the mystery of His will, according to His kind intention which He purposed in Him

esv.text: making known to us the mystery of his will, according to his purpose, which he set forth in Christ

cnv.text: 他照著自己在基督裡預先安排的美意，使我們知道他旨意的奧祕，

ccb.text: 照着祂在基督里所定的美好计划叫我们知道祂旨意的奥秘，

csbs.text: 照着他在基督里预先定下的美意，让我们明白了他旨意的奥秘，
